subcodes.first_line: O ye spiritual friends! Praise be to God that whatsoever flowed from the Pen of the Covenant became manifest and evident, and as to that which had not yet come to pass [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران رحمانی الحمد لله آنچه از کلک میثاق جاری ظاهر و عیان شد و آنچه تا بحال نشده
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @growth of the Cause, @predictions and prophecies, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
